business_need.problem: The team needs summer campaign delivery capacity.
business_need.why_now: The summer campaign calendar has increased.

success_outcomes.measure: At least three approved posts each week.
success_outcomes.source_statement: Deliver three approved posts each week.

responsibilities.description: Draft and schedule social campaign content.
responsibilities.source_statement: Draft weekly campaign content with the team.

requirements.name: Channel-aware social content
requirements.description: Can adapt content choices to a named social channel.
accepted_equivalents: Academic, volunteer, club, or personal channel work
requirements.business_rationale: The intern contributes to active social campaigns from week one.
requirements.source_statement: They must explain how they adapted content for a social channel.

requirements.name: Basic visual-content tooling
requirements.description: Can make simple edits in a suitable visual content tool.
requirements.source_statement: Basic visual editing would be useful but teachable.

zuru_dna_behaviours.role_behaviour: Shares draft work early and incorporates specific feedback.
zuru_dna_behaviours.source_statement: They work openly with marketing and creative peers.

constraints.work_rights: Must hold valid New Zealand work rights.
